description: MCP server for Google Ads — 22 tools for spend diagnosis, impression share, and asset performance.

environmentVariables.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID from Google Cloud Console

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Default Google Ads customer ID (numeric, no dashes). Can be overridden per tool call.

environmentVariables.description: Manager (MCC) account ID — required only if accessing accounts under an MCC
